jobs.content:
Lab Genomics Inc. is looking for an enthusiastic Biotechnology Intern to join our Cell Biology team for Summer 2026.

Responsibilities include cell culture maintenance, PCR assay development, and data analysis. This is a paid undergraduate internship open to current juniors and seniors pursuing a Bachelor's in Biotechnology, Biology, or a related life science field.

  • Run qPCR and gel electrophoresis
  • Maintain mammalian cell lines
  • Assist with CRISPR editing experiments
jobs.title: Biotechnology Intern — Cell Biology
